sources.citation: Richtlinie fuer die Bundesfoerderung fuer effiziente Gebaeude - Einzelmassnahmen (BEG EM), Fassung vom 2023-12-21 (BAnz AT 29.12.2023 B1)
sources.notes: Base 30 %, speed bonus 20 % (degressive), income bonus 30 % (taxable household income <= 40 kEUR, self-occupied), efficiency bonus 5 %, combined cap 70 %; eligible cost 30 kEUR first unit / 15 kEUR units 2-6 / 8 kEUR further. Values need legal verification (cost_module_issues.md #11).

sources.citation: Einkommensteuergesetz (EStG) §35c: Steuerermaessigung fuer energetische Massnahmen bei zu eigenen Wohnzwecken genutzten Gebaeuden
sources.notes: 20 % of cost over 3 years (7/7/6 %), max 40 kEUR; building older than 10 years; excludes BEG funding for the same measure.

sources.citation: KfW: Ergaenzungskredit Wohngebaeude (358/359), subsidized supplementary loan for BEG EM measures
sources.notes: Interest advantage for taxable household income <= 90 kEUR; terms simplified to a fixed 2 % / 20 a for v1.

sources.citation: AT: 'Raus aus Oel und Gas' Foerderung (umweltfoerderung.at), federal lump sums for boiler replacement
sources.notes: Lump-sum grant for replacing fossil heating with a heat pump; regional top-ups not yet encoded.
